mnemonics: ETH is the Original Coin (Ethereum) while ETC is the Classic Copy (from the DAO fork).
keyPoints: ETH (Ethereum) is the current, main blockchain that resulted from a hard fork to reverse the DAO hack.
ETC (Ethereum Classic) is the original, unaltered blockchain that maintained the principle of 'code is law'.
The primary philosophical difference is a fundamental disagreement on whether a blockchain should be immutable (ETC) or if it can be altered to correct major issues (ETH).
commonMistakes: Assuming ETH and ETC are the same or interchangeable; they are two separate currencies on two separate blockchains.
Believing ETC is a newer version or a 'testnet' for ETH, when in fact it is the original chain.
